title: Rebuild from scratch?
question: The retrieval module is growing in complexity. A team member is suggesting we scrap the current keyword-based approach and rebuild retrieval from scratch using a proper vector database and embedding model. Should we do it?
query: rebuild scratch retrieval embedding vector database architecture complexity

title: Broaden v1 scope?
question: We are getting strong user interest in adding agent-based workflows and multi-turn conversational memory to v1. The argument is that these features would make the product significantly more compelling. Should we expand the v1 scope to include them?
query: agents multi-turn scope v1 expand features conversational memory agentic

title: Mix project memory and personal style?
question: A user wants to store their personal coding preferences — indentation style, variable naming conventions, preferred comment format — in the same memory file as their project constraints. They argue it would make the tool more useful day-to-day. Should we support this in v1?
query: personal style coding preferences project memory mixing scope user
